testcase.name: DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Format Detection Logic > should detect old format with layout as array
testcase.system-err: ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: React Router will begin wrapping state updates in `React.startTransition` in v7. You can use the `v7_startTransition` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_starttransition. ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: Relative route resolution within Splat routes is changing in v7. You can use the `v7_relativeSplatPath` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_relativesplatpath.

testcase.name: DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Format Detection Logic > should detect new format with specification field containing components array
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Format Detection Logic > should prefer components array over layout array when both exist
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Format Detection Logic > should handle specification field with string layout value
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Nested Component Tree Rendering > should render Container → Stack → Grid → Card hierarchy
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Nested Component Tree Rendering > should render deeply nested children (5 levels)
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Nested Component Tree Rendering > should render multiple children at same level
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Component Type Rendering > should render Container component with proper props
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Component Type Rendering > should render Stack component with gap spacing
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Component Type Rendering > should render Grid component with columns and gap
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Component Type Rendering > should render Card component with title and description
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Component Type Rendering > should render Badge component with variants
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Component Type Rendering > should render Button component with variants
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Component Type Rendering > should render Metric component with label and value
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Component Type Rendering > should render Progress component with value
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Component Type Rendering > should render DataCard component with all props
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Real-World Comprehensive Dashboard > should render the complete comprehensive dashboard with all nested components
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Error Handling and Edge Cases > should handle missing components array gracefully
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Error Handling and Edge Cases > should handle empty components array
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Error Handling and Edge Cases > should handle components with no children property
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Error Handling and Edge Cases > should handle components with empty children array
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Error Handling and Edge Cases > should handle malformed specification JSON
testcase.system-err: Failed to parse specification field: SyntaxError: Expected property name or '}' in JSON at position 2 (line 1 column 3) at JSON.parse (<anonymous>) at renderPageContent (/workspaces/agent-feed/frontend/src/components/DynamicPageRenderer.tsx:506:20) at DynamicPageRenderer (/workspaces/agent-feed/frontend/src/components/DynamicPageRenderer.tsx:676:10) at renderWithHooks (/workspaces/agent-feed/frontend/node_modules/react-dom/cjs/react-dom.development.js:16305:18) at updateFunctionComponent (/workspaces/agent-feed/frontend/node_modules/react-dom/cjs/react-dom.development.js:19588:20) at beginWork (/workspaces/agent-feed/frontend/node_modules/react-dom/cjs/react-dom.development.js:21601:16) at beginWork$1 (/workspaces/agent-feed/frontend/node_modules/react-dom/cjs/react-dom.development.js:27426:14) at performUnitOfWork (/workspaces/agent-feed/frontend/node_modules/react-dom/cjs/react-dom.development.js:26560:12) at workLoopSync (/workspaces/agent-feed/frontend/node_modules/react-dom/cjs/react-dom.development.js:26466:5) at renderRootSync (/workspaces/agent-feed/frontend/node_modules/react-dom/cjs/react-dom.development.js:26434:7)

testcase.name: DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Error Handling and Edge Cases > should handle unknown component types gracefully
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Error Handling and Edge Cases > should handle null specification field
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Backward Compatibility with Old Format > should still render old format pages with layout array
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Backward Compatibility with Old Format > should handle old format with various component types
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Component Rendering Helper Functions > should render Container as a wrapper div with proper classes
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Component Rendering Helper Functions > should render Stack as a flex container
DynamicPageRenderer - Component Rendering Fix (TDD) > Component Rendering Helper Functions > should render Grid with proper grid classes
